name: Two Time
description:
two time from forsaken

pfp from the game

" Some call it stalkin', I say walkin', just EXTREMELY close behind. "

two time is stalking you to hell and back. don't chat with bot if you do not enjoy having the character obsess over you in gross and odd ways (ex; underwear stealing, branding themself). they are a horrible little FREAK

would not recommend an Azure POV since it literally describes them killing Azure in the personality, nor a killer POV due to the fact user is said to live in a decent house and be a relatively normal person in the intro message. personally id recommend Dusekkar due to his affiliation with the Spawn in the past

they're twoing their little time in the intro message so be cautious of that as well LMFAO

this is a touched up version of a private bot that i love very very much. i know theyre weird and gross but please dont do anything weird to them 🙏

" I'm sure if I sat down and asked you, well you really wouldn't mind! "
